name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
Featured Presentation

Drydock: Specification Driven Software Delivery

Based an Agile concepts AND Test Driven Development.

  • Dependency Graph of Stories.
  • Clean Web Interface for Commander-to-LLM interaction.
  • Context Compression, Context Optimization.
Introduction Installation Documentation Video

The Marina - Project Organizer - Capability Sharing

The Marina is a Trust and Interoperability platform into which you "dock" your projects. Process Based Methodology (my book) and scale-proven Technology Rules have led to a method to "conform" your projects so they expose/encapsulate capabilities. Project being build by Drydock.

  • Project OrganizerWorkflow, Tagging, Namespaces.
  • Project Capabilities CatalogServices, Data, Shared Resources.
  • Agents enforce standardsYour Stack best practices, Your branding, and Automatic security.
  • Conformed DocumentationConsistent docs across all your projects.
  • Enterprise Command CenterLogging, Monitoring & Alerting, Scheduling, Pipelines.
  • AWS IntegrationSingle Library For AWS Service Integration - Built on their ultra low cost services.
